title: cloezia artensis var. basilaris
intro: Cloezia artensis var. basilaris, also known as the Mountain Cloezia, is a flowering plant species native to the island of New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cloezia artensis var. basilaris include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Cloezia artensis var. basilaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
